title: Evilution Configuration
description: Schema for .evilution.yml / config/evilution.yml. Declaring `schema_version` opts the file into strict validation at load time.

schema_version.description: Config schema version. Currently must be 1. Declaring it enables strict validation: unknown keys are rejected and a future schema_version is refused.

target.description: Filter expression: method (Foo#bar), class (Foo), namespace wildcard (Foo*), method-type selector (Foo# / Foo.), descendants (descendants:Foo), or source glob (source:**/*.rb).

min_score.description: Minimum mutation score (0.0–1.0) for exit code 0.

verbose.description: Verbose output (RSS/GC stats per phase, error details for errored mutations).

fail_fast.description: Stop after N surviving mutants. null or omitted = disabled.

baseline.description: Run baseline test suite first to detect pre-existing failures and mark those mutations :neutral.

isolation.description: Isolation strategy. auto selects fork for Rails projects.

incremental.description: Cache killed/timeout results across runs and skip them when source is unchanged.

suggest_tests.description: Generate concrete test code in survivor suggestions (RSpec or Minitest, matching integration).

line_ranges.description: Per-file line-range constraints. Typically set via CLI; rare in YAML.

spec_files.description: Explicit spec files to run. Bypasses auto-detection when non-empty.

ignore_patterns.description: AST patterns to skip during mutation generation. See docs/ast_pattern_syntax.md.

show_disabled.description: Report mutations skipped by `# evilution:disable` comments.

baseline_session.description: Saved session file path for HTML report comparison.

skip_heredoc_literals.description: Skip all string literal mutations inside heredocs (recommended for Rails: heredoc SQL/templates rarely have coverage).

related_specs_heuristic.description: When a mutation removes an `includes(...)` call, also run matching specs from spec/{requests,integration,features,system}.

fallback_to_full_suite.description: When no matching spec resolves, run the entire suite instead of marking the mutation :unresolved.

preload.description: Path to preload before forking workers. false to disable. null to auto-detect spec/rails_helper.rb -> spec/spec_helper.rb -> test/test_helper.rb for Rails projects.

spec_mappings.description: Custom mapping from source file to spec file(s). Keys are source paths; values are spec path strings or arrays of spec paths.

spec_pattern.description: Glob restricting resolved spec candidates to files matching this pattern.

example_targeting.description: Per-mutation example-level targeting via body-token scan.

example_targeting_fallback.description: Behavior when targeting finds no matching example.

example_targeting_cache.description: LRU cache bounds for the spec AST parser that powers example targeting.

quiet_children.description: Redirect each worker's stdout/stderr to per-pid files under quiet_children_dir.

profile.description: Operator profile. strict adds aggressive truthiness mutators on top of default.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks: keys are event names (e.g. worker_process_start, mutation_insert_pre); values are paths to Ruby files returning a Proc.
